title: GCP Error Reporting group
description: Normalized Error Reporting group snapshot, sourced from the Error Reporting API GET /v1beta1/projects/{project}/groupStats. One record per error group. Read-only.

count.description: Approximate occurrence count in the returned time range.

affectedUsersCount.description: Approximate affected user count in the returned time range.

service.description: The primary affected service, when available.

version.description: The primary affected service version, when available.

exceptionType.description: Representative exception type for the group, when available.

exceptionMessage.description: Representative exception message for the group, when available.

firstSeenTime.description: First seen timestamp returned by Error Reporting.

lastSeenTime.description: Last seen timestamp returned by Error Reporting.

detailLink.description: Link to the Error Reporting group details page, when available.
